data.body: SCENARIO 5 (textual conflict) PASS live — ALL 7 SCENARIOS NOW PROVEN. fb-edit (change 277, MERGED to FB) + conflicting main-edit (change 278, MERGED to main) on the same file docs/e2e/s5-conflict.txt; the --no-ff merge of FB into main hit a real add/add textual conflict, resolved in the merge commit (change 279). The auto-merge delta is NON-EMPTY — reviewed files = [/MERGE_LIST, docs/e2e/s5-conflict.txt] — so the bot reviews the conflict-RESOLUTION content (LLM=1 VER=1). Deliberate contrast with scenario 6 (clean merge -> /MERGE_LIST-only -> empty author delta). S5 SCENARIO SUMMARY (all live): 1 parallel-siblings(251/252 merge-if-necessary no-rebase) | 2 stacking(248 delta-only) | 3 merge-back(254 atomic, GitHub main advanced, zero re-review) | 4 vote-carry(S3 AC4 change 234 MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE carries LLM, Verified re-runs) | 5 textual-conflict(279 non-empty resolution reviewed) | 6 semantic-conflict(276 empty delta, LLM passes, CI red, Verified=-1 BLOCKS submit — critical AC) | 7 ACL-negatives(403 branch-create + 'not allowed to upload merges' for non-member; concurrency+webhook precedent). Committed harness: infra/gerrit/feature-branch-e2e.sh + feature-branch-e2e-scenarios.sh.
